name: Scrim Scheduler
description: Auxiliary esports scheduling surface for managing scrim calendars and inspecting match detail with live scoreboards and timelines.

page_briefs.scrims: Scrim scheduling page. Top region renders a week-view scrim-calendar with time slots, opponent blocks, and map selections color-coded by confirmation status. Below, a data-table lists upcoming scrims with columns for date, opponent, format, maps, confirmation status, and contact — supporting quick reschedule and cancellation actions.
page_briefs.match-detail: Single match detail page. Detail-header spans the top with match title, teams, date, tournament, and best-of format. Below, a detail scoreboard-live tracks round-by-round scoring with player kills, objectives, and economy. Bottom region shows a timeline marking significant in-match events — first blood, objective takes, team fights, and match-deciding moments.
